notable_quotes: I didn't realize he actually aggroed, I thought he didn't know what went on down there.
No, he always doesn't come down for the fight. He doesn't come down for the fight. I thought he left. But I never knew he stayed up here. I thought he left.
That's why I like having... being a caster that knows, um, Ray of Frost as a cantrip. Because you can just put all the fire out.
Oh no, I do not have enough gold on me.
priority_actions: Add 'Total Transaction Cost vs. Current Gold' preview to trade menus.
Improve landing zone snapping and visual feedback for the Jump action on vertical terrain.
Add 'Out of Reach' status text to tooltips for suspended environmental containers.
Increase the visual contrast or highlight pulse for small interactable loot in cluttered Underdark environments.
Fix facial tentacle clipping on Omeluum's character model during dialogue transitions (observed at 16:36).
